text_query: medicine for a migraine that won't cause rebound headaches
reasonings: Diclofenac NSAID can manage migraine attack symptoms but is not a preventive option and NSAID overuse itself risks rebound/medication-overuse headache.
Same diclofenac NSAID profile as above; useful for acute migraine pain but frequent NSAID use can cause rebound headaches.
